name: chain_acquisition_data_for_gotomarket_is_s
method: [ACQUISITION] Data for go-to-market is shocking. We built our own web app and API to fix it. 82 companies onboard so far.

stages.task: Scrape public company data from free sources (website tech stack via BuiltWith free, LinkedIn company pages, Crunchbase free tier)
Cross-reference and merge data points per company: tech stack, employee count, funding stage, contact emails from existing lead DB
Score data completeness (0-100) and lead quality, flag gaps, deduplicate against existing leads in AUTOMATIONS/leads/
Route high-score leads to cold_outbound chain, log enrichment stats to KPI dashboard
